title: Get board ID from Board Name via API
excerpt:
Hi Team, 
I’m trying to return a board ID from a Board name and have come up blank on everything so far. 
Tried putting name in the arguments for boards and it returns that it is not a valid argument. 
I was just wonderi…

posts.author: stoveynz (Devon Stove)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

I’m trying to return a board ID from a Board name and have come up blank on everything so far.

Tried putting name in the arguments for boards and it returns that it is not a valid argument.

I was just wondering if anyone has a method to do this?

Much Appreciated!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @stoveynz

Welcome to the community. As you can have several boards with the same name, this is a tricky one. There is no GraphQL query for this. Closest you can get is to query all boards and loop through them to aware the board name.

posts.author: stoveynz (Devon Stove)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the quick reply!

Was clutching at straws hoping I didn’t need to do that but it’s not the end of the world.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
